title: MCS Ender Dragon
description: Improves Ender Dragon boss fight, Enderman AI, makes Phantoms more balanced and more new features. All features can be enabled/disabled with gamerules.
body:
RESOURCEPACK IS REQUIRED!
===
Main Information
===
* Creator and Developer: [ŌĆŗMC Silver]
* Minecraft Versions: 1.19+
* WIKI Version: 26.1v1
* For datapack developers: My datapack ignores all mobs that use data! (1.21.5+) \
  For custom mobs, use data; for non-custom mobs, use tags/scores!
* WARNING! (for PaperMC and PurpurMC Hosters): \
This datapack will only work correctly if you only change the below settings. \
Head over to your server, and go to "config/paper-world-defaults.yml" or "purpur.yml" file. \
Find this "allow-non-player-entities-on-scoreboards" and set that to true

Commands
=== 
All commands available to the player start with /function .
---
Menu
---
- /function .menu:mcs_dragon

Summon
---
- /function .summon:mcs_dragon/"entity_name"

Uninstall
---
- /function .uninstall:mcs_dragon

Mobs
===
Ender Dragon
---
Basic information
- HP ŌÖź’ĖÅ: 400 (200 hearts)
- Attack Damage ŌÜö’ĖÅ: 10 (5 hearts)

* Summons new glowing crystals
* Shoots new end pearl fireballs
* Shoots homing end eye fireballs, which follows nearest enemy
* Gains purple aura while landing on the portal.
* Summons homing fireballs, teleport and heals +10 health (Super Attack)
* Becomes more aggressive on lower health
* Has 1% chance to teleports to Purple End Crystal
* Dragon's Breath applies a wither and slowness effects to the target

Loot: [ŌĆŗ4-8 items]
1. Ender Pearl (8-16) [ŌĆŗ16%]
2. Phantom Membrane (8-16) [ŌĆŗ15%]
3. Obsidian (8-16) [ŌĆŗ13%]
4. Chorus Fruit (32-64) [ŌĆŗ11%]
5. Ender Chest (1) [ŌĆŗ8%]
6. Shulker Box (1) [ŌĆŗ8%]
7. Golden Apple (1-2) [ŌĆŗ10%]
8. Dragon Head (1) [ŌĆŗ4%]
9. Dragon Egg (1) [ŌĆŗ4%]
10. Elytra (1) [ŌĆŗ8%]

Glowing Crystal
---
- All crystals despawn in 30-60 seconds, except Purple Crystal
- All special abilities of crystal work in 32 blocks of radius
- All crystals heal Ender Dragon
  
* Yellow Crystal: Heals the dragon
* Purple Crystal:
  1. Reduces all incoming damage by 80%, 
  2. Knockback resistance 100%
* Red Crystal: Deals fire damage entities with beam
* Blue Crystal: Slows enemies and teleports in random location
* Gold Crystal: Summons lightning bolt
* Aqua Crystal: Gives blindness and levitation effects to enemies

Dragon Hunter
---
Basic information
- HP ŌÖź’ĖÅ: 40 (20 hearts)
- Range ­¤æü’ĖÅ: 40 blocks
- Speed ŌÅ®: 0.3/0.35 (Fast)
- Attack Damage ŌÜö’ĖÅ: 8-12 (4-6 hearts)
- Ranged Attack Damage ­¤Å╣: 8
- Mainhand Weapon ­¤ŚĪ’ĖÅ:
   1. Diamond Sword (40%)
   2. Iron Sword (20%)
   3. Iron Axe (20%)
   4. Trident (20%)
- Offhand Weapon: Shield (20%)
- Has random armor, dragon head and elytra (100%)
- Attacks Players, Phantoms and Ender Dragons
- With shields, they immune to knockback


Special Ability:
- Flies with elytra.
- Rarely summons homing purple fireball from the sky.

Loot: [ŌĆŗ0-2 items]
1. Ender Pearl (0-2) [57.1%]
2. Phantom Membrane (0-2) [28.5%]
3. Eye of Ender (0-1) [14.2%]

(Never drops weapon and armor pieces)

Enderman
---
Basic information
- HP ŌÖź’ĖÅ: 40 (20 hearts)
- Range ­¤æü’ĖÅ: 60 blocks
- Speed ŌÅ®: 0.3 (Fast)
- Attack Damage ŌÜö’ĖÅ: 7 (3.5 hearts)
- Attack Damage With Block ­¤¦▒: 10 (5 hearts)

* Attacks player, if it kills Enderman in 16 block of radius.
* Picks up chorus plant block.
* Picks up chorus fruit and sometimes eat it.
* Can keep 512 chorus fruits in it's inventory.
* Regenerates health when it's eat chorus fruit.
* Burns once exposed to direct sunlight for too long.
* Teleports more often and has 5% chance to spawn Endermite.
* Teleports from boats and minecarts.
* Spawns with infested blocks with 1% in the end.
* Gets 30% slower when on fire.
* When looked at, it may apply negative effects or emit a scream.
* Rarely crafts chorus flower with 4 chorus fruits, it must stay on end stone block.
* Has a small chance to teleport its target to a random location.
* Heals on random teleport.

Loot: (Vanilla loot)

Phantom
---
Basic information
- HP ŌÖź’ĖÅ: 20 (10 hearts)
- Attack Damage ŌÜö’ĖÅ: 2 (1 heart)

* Takes extra damage from fire.
* Disappears if it doesn't find any targets within 60 seconds.
* Has better AI and finds their target easily.
* Despawns if area light is more than 12.
* The player's insomnia level is displayed as the phantom gets larger.
* Phantom becomes larger after +3 nights!   
- Size: +0.2   
- Health: +10   
- Damage: +1   
- Knockback Resistance: +0.1   
- Attack Knockback: +0.3   
- Loot Table: +1 Phantom Membrane
* The maximum buffed Phantom spawns after 30 days

Loot: (Vanilla loot)

Shulker
---
Basic information
- HP ŌÖź’ĖÅ: 30 (15 hearts)
- AP ­¤øĪ’ĖÅ (When closed): 20 (10 hearts)
- Range ­¤æü’ĖÅ: 16 blocks
- Shulker Bullet Damage ­¤ö½: 4 (2 hearts) (with levitation)

Special Ability:
* Heals 4 health points per second when closed.
* Heals 8 health points when it receives the Levitation effect.

Loot: (Vanilla loot)

Camouflage Shulker
---
Basic information
- HP ŌÖź’ĖÅ: 30 (15 hearts)
- AP ­¤øĪ’ĖÅ (When closed): 20 (10 hearts)
- Range ­¤æü’ĖÅ: 16 blocks
- Shulker Bullet Damage ­¤ö½: 4 (2 hearts) (with levitation)

Special Ability: 
* Heals 8 health points when it receives the Levitation effect.
* Can hide inside blocks.
* While hidden, it heals 1 health point every 2 seconds.
* While hidden, it may randomly emerge if an aggressive entity is within an 8-block radius.
* When it emerges, it deals 6 damage and launches the target into the air.

Loot: [ŌĆŗ1 items]
1. End Stone (0-2) [ŌĆŗ90%]
2. White Shulker Box (0-1) [9%]

[Shulker Bullets have a 5% chance per second to explode in a 3-block radius, dealing 6 damage and launching targets into the air]

End Guardian
---
Basic information
- HP ŌÖź’ĖÅ: 40 (20 hearts)
- Range ­¤æü’ĖÅ: 40 blocks
- Laser Damage ŌÖ”’ĖÅ: 6 (3 hearts) (with levitation)

Special Ability: 
* Has teleport and flying abilites and immune to fall damage.
* End Guardian's beam gives levitation effect to the targeted entity.
* End Guardian's beam has little chance to teleport you in a random location.
* Takes damage in water and dries nearby water sources.

Loot:
1. End Stone (0-2)
2. Chorus Fruit (1)
3. Ender Eye (1)

Cat
---
Basic information
- HP ŌÖź’ĖÅ: 20 (10 hearts)

Special Ability: 
* Cats have a 5% chance to permanently scare away Phantoms

Items
===

Elytra
---
* Durability lose depends on flying speed:
  1. 0-16 blocks per second: 0 durability
  2. 17-31 blocks per second: -1 durability
  3. 32-64 blocks per second: -2 durability
  4. 65+ blocks per second: -3 durability
* Displays durability while flying.
* If you aren't flying, you can repair the elytra by holding the phantom membrane in your offhand and putting the elytra on your body.
* Mending enchantment drains xp from your inventory.
* Mending repairs elytra when player isn't flying.
* Elytra with unbreaking requires more xp and phantom membranes to be fixed
  1. +108 durability; -1 xp -> +1 dirability (100%), without unbreaking
  2. +54 durability; -1 xp -> +1 durability (50%), unbreaking I
  3. +36 durability; -1 xp -> +1 durability (33%), unbreaking II
  4. +27 durability; -1 xp -> +1 durability (25%), unbreaking III

Ender Eye
---
* You can use Ender Eye in all dimensions.
* Makes Phantom despawn in 16 blocks of radius.
* Stops Enderman in 16 blocks of radius, with 20% chance enderman despawns instantly.

Trident (Loyalty)
---
* Enchanted with loyalty returns from ends void.

Connected World
===
- The Overworld and The End dimensions are connected now.

From the Overworld to the End
---
- Fly to 640 height in the Overworld and you will be teleported in 10 seconds.

From the End to the Overworld
--- 
- Jump in the void and you will be teleported in the Overworld on 540 height.

Mob Spawning
===
Dragon Hunter
1. Spawn Location:
The End Dimension on pickaxe mineable blocks only.
2. Spawn Chance: 1%
3. Spawn Count: 0-4

Camouflage Shulker
1. Spawn Location:
The End Dimension on end stone block only.
2. Spawn Chance: 1%

Silverfish
1. Spawn Location:
The End Dimension on pickaxe mineable blocks only; After breaking infested blocks.
2. Spawn Chance: 5%

Phantom
1. Spawn Location:
The End Dimension on pickaxe mineable blocks only, if 10 blocks are air above the surface
2. Spawn Chance: 5%

End Guardian
1. Spawn Location: 
The End Dimension on pickaxe mineable blocks only.
2. Spawn Chance: 1%

End City
---
Spawn Chance:
1. Phantom (10%)
2. Dragon Hunter (10%)
2. End Guardian (10%)
3. Shulker (5%)
